name: @opentf/workeros-web
description: WorkerOS host runtime: kernel-worker + program-worker shims and the main-thread client API.

scripts.build:codec: cargo build -p workeros-codec --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p ../workeros-programs/src/codec && cp ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workeros_codec.wasm ../workeros-programs/src/codec/codec.wasm
scripts.build:bundler: cargo build -p workeros-node-bundler --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p ../workeros-programs/src/node-bundler && cp ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workeros_node_bundler.wasm ../workeros-programs/src/node-bundler/bundler.wasm
